ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER FIRST COLLATERAL SERVICES, INC.'S VERIFIED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST COLLATERAL SERVICES,INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT INTERNATIONAL MORTGAGE SERVICES,LLC DBA USA FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC REYNOLDS, JOHN B CUNNINGHAN, JOHN $484,762.36 PRINCIPAL, $40,200.04 ATTORNEY FEES, $14,937.54 INTEREST, $8,137.50 COSTS, $6,375.00 ADDITIONAL ATTORNEYS' FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $554,412.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
